response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software engineering leadership with experience in event-driven systems, distributed architectures, and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience, real-time credit risk systems, or multi-agent AI operations in regulated environments. His recent roles focus more on general software development and AI-agent tooling rather than high-stakes fintech infrastructure. His fintech-relevant experience (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Optilyz) does not align closely with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq, MCP code generators)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and establishing development best practices (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: No direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance)
Limited demonstrated experience with multi-agent AI systems in production (recent work at re:cinq is promising but not fintech-focused)
Lacks regulatory/compliance experience in high-stakes financial environments
